title: Araxy Crystals
description: Reimagines the End Crystal with a minimalistic, clean and modern design. Perfect for both crystal pvp and casual vanilla.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8dfc5d594d45e557fd238738cfd6acb1aac4b9c.png) #

💎 Araxy – Modern End Crystals

Araxy is a custom Minecraft texture pack that reimagines the End Crystal with a sleek, minimalist, and modern design. Instead of the chaotic and flashy vanilla crystal, Araxy gives you a refined, geometric look that feels futuristic yet perfectly fits the End’s mysterious vibe.

# ✨ Features - 💎 A fully redesigned End Crystal with a modern, clean and simple style - 🎨 Minimalist geometry that keeps the design sharp and readable - 🧩 Perfectly balanced between stylish and functional - ⚔️ Optimized for crystal PvP – easily spot crystals in fast-paced fights - 🌐 Ideal for Crystal PvP and all environments. - 🚫 Removes unnecessary clutter for a smooth, polished look - ⚙️ No mods neeeded ![Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b0cb4efa2076b7c5083b7f2cbab0c465a9ad858.png) ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d06eb85665a5a9189553838da694a0465b675363.png) ![Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c989c28f571236c02cc3f7f07027646c4ad204.png) Whether you’re fighting the Ender Dragon, building futuristic bases, or dominating in crystal PvP, Araxy makes End Crystals look clean and elegant, turning them into a visual centerpiece rather than a noisy distraction. Perfect for players who love a clean, modern Minecraft aesthetic, Araxy transforms End Crystals into something that feels elegant, futuristic, and visually satisfying – all while staying lightweight and distraction-free. _For further questions, contact polar882 on Discord._
